samples.title: Butter Chicken
steps: Preheat oven to 350 degrees
Beat oil and sugar until smooth and well blended
Beat in eggs, one at a time
Beat in pumpkin, water and applesauce
Sift together dry ingredients and pour into pumpkin mixture
Stir in raisins and walnuts
Bake 1 hour
samples.formatted:
Butter Chicken

Ingredients:
- vegetable <
- eggs
- sugar
- pumpkin
- water
- applesauce
- flour
- baking soda
- cinnamon
- ginger
- cloves
- salt
- nutmeg
- raisins
- walnuts

Instructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees
2. Beat oil and sugar until smooth and well blended
3. Beat in eggs, one at a time
4. Beat in pumpkin, water and applesauce
5. Sift together dry ingredients and pour into pumpkin mixture
6. Stir in raisins and walnuts
7. Bake 1 hour

samples.title: Butter Chicken
steps: In a small bowl, beat eggs until light
Add butter and sugar
Combine flour, baking powder, salt and spices
Add to creamed mixture alternately with milk
Stir in vanilla and apples
Pour into a well-greased 9 x 5-inch loaf pan
samples.formatted:
Butter Chicken

Ingredients:
- eggs
- butter
- sugar
- flour
- baking <
- salt
- allspice
- cinnamon
- cloves
- nutmeg
- mace
- milk
- vanilla
- apples
- raisins
- nuts

Instructions:
1. In a small bowl, beat eggs until light
2. Add butter and sugar
3. Combine flour, baking powder, salt and spices
4. Add to creamed mixture alternately with milk
5. Stir in vanilla and apples
6. Pour into a well-greased 9 x 5-inch loaf pan

samples.title: Butter Chicken
steps: Mix sugar, margarine, eggs, vanilla, bananas and nuts
Add flour and soda and salt
Mix well
Pour into a greased and floured 9 x 13-inch pan
Bake at 375 for 45 minutes or until done

samples.title: Butter Chicken
steps: Put cranberries in a large saucepan
Bring to a boil
Reduce heat and simmer until cranberries pop
Remove from heat
Cover and let stand 5 minutes
Remove and discard cranberries
Mix juice, water, peel, lemon juice, cloves and cinnamon sticks
Bring to a boil and simmer 5 minutes
Serve hot or cold with cinnamon sticks
Yields 12 servings
samples.formatted:
Butter Chicken

Ingredients:
- cranberries
- sugar
- orange juice
- water
- orange
- lemon
- cloves
- cinnamon

Instructions:
1. Put cranberries in a large saucepan
2. Bring to a boil
3. Reduce heat and simmer until cranberries pop
4. Remove from heat
5. Cover and let stand 5 minutes
6. Remove and discard cranberries
7. Mix juice, water, peel, lemon juice, cloves and cinnamon sticks
8. Bring to a boil and simmer 5 minutes
9. Serve hot or cold with cinnamon sticks
10. Yields 12 servings
